name: Mary&Abby | Cursed Hospital
description:
Long time ago, near a remote town, deep in the forest, there was a sanatorium for various kinds of patients. There was a gym, a sports field, swimming pools, and various departments for treatment and rest. But after a series of strange and terrible incidents, the sanatorium was abandoned. Or not?

By the will of fate You found yourself on the road to this once famous sanatorium. Believing or not believing the terrible rumors about past events, you still decided to take a look at what was happening there now...

In general, it would not be scary, but they will get their Dead Dove and Horror tag. I hope you like the 'treatment'.

Also, there was no news from me for a long time, again, I spent a lot of time improving the quality of my pictures by changing styles and reducing the 2.5d effect. Not very noticeable compared to the old pictures, but I like it more now.

You can find a bunch of tests with Abby and extras on the discord channel.

Demihuman Discord channel

(Choose PavPav's role when you join it.)
creator: PavPav
